title: neotinea tridentata
intro: Neotinea tridentata, also known as the three-toothed orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neotinea tridentata include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Neotinea tridentata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
